images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese gravure idol, radiating a cozy yet seductive weekend vibe in a high-end hotel room. She stands confidently in a reading corner surrounded by floor-to-ceiling bookshelves, wearing a form-fitting, textured cream-colored knit sweater that clings to her ample chest and slim waist, paired with a pleated mini skirt that highlights her curvy legs. Her silky straight black hair frames a face with flawless skin texture, visible pores, and faint vellus hair, as she locks eyes with the camera with a confident, playful smirk. The scene is bathed in bright, overcast soft sky light, creating an overexposed high-key aesthetic with no heavy shadows, while the blurred background bokeh emphasizes her presence. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts
